zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde d'Albon於1096年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯阿爾艾阿爾波- 達亞艾時，她的父親Guigues III comte d'Albon31歲，母親Matilde de Altavila24歲。她於1120年與Amédée de Savoie III結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1148年1月在她的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯阿爾艾阿爾波- 達亞艾。

nameMeanings.name: d'Albon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Dalton in Westmorland, Durham, Lancashire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire, from Old English dæl ‘valley’ (see Dale ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: The surname was taken to Ireland by English traders in the early 13th century .

variants.name: Daughton
meanings: English (Lincolnshire) and Irish (Kilkenny and Tipperary): variant of   Dalton  .

variants.name: Dale
meanings: English: from Middle English dal, dale, daile ‘dale, valley’ (Old English dæl, reinforced in northern England by the cognate Old Norse dalr), a topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called with this word, such as Dale in Cumbria and Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from a common farm named from Old Norse dali, the dative case of dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde d'Albon was born in 1096, in Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Guigues III comte d'Albon, was 31 and her mother, Matilde de Altavila, was 24. She married Amédée de Savoie III in 1120. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died about January 1148, in her hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde d'Albon est née en 1096, à Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Guigues III comte d'Albon, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Matilde de Altavila, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Amédée de Savoie III en 1120. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ janvier 1148, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde d'Albon 1096 in Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guigues III comte d'Albon 31 und ihre Mutter Matilde de Altavila 24. Sie hat 1120 Amédée de Savoie III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um Januar 1148 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde d'Albon è nata il nel 1096 nel Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Guigues III comte d'Albon, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Matilde de Altavila, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Amédée de Savoie III nel 1120. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì circa gennaio 1148, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde d'Albonが1096年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスアルドeチェアルボン- ド'アルドeチェで生まれた時，父Guigues III comte d'Albonは31歳，母Matilde de Altavilaは24歳であった。1120年にAmédée de Savoie IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1148年1月に故郷で52歳で死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスアルドeチェアルボン- ド'アルドeチェにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde d'Albon(이)가 1096년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 아드e체 알보- 드'아르드e체에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guigues III comte d'Albon(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilde de Altavila(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1120년 Amédée de Savoie III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1148년 1월 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 아드e체 알보- 드'아르드e체에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde d'Albon nasceu em 1096, em Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guigues III comte d'Albon, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Matilde de Altavila, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Amédée de Savoie III em 1120. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente janeiro de 1148, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde d'Albon родилась в 1096 г. в местности албон- д'ардeч, ардeч, рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Guigues III comte d'Albon было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Matilde de Altavila, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Amédée de Savoie III в 1120 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла около январь 1148 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности албон- д'ардeч, ардeч, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde d'Albon nació en 1096, en Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guigues III comte d'Albon, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Matilde de Altavila, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Amédée de Savoie III en 1120. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente enero de 1148, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
